name: Sweet Tooth Recipe
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Oats (Oat Flour or Blended Oats)
recipeInstructions:
Mix Dry Ingredients.
Mix Wet Ingredients, except for honey. Combine the wet and dry ingredients. If the batter is too dry (it should be moist and pliable), add up to 1/2 cup honey. Refrigerate until the batter is cold. Bake in a 300-325 degree oven. Lightly spray pans with Pam or use baker liner sheets. Cook until crispy looking. Note that this is very important because the cookies will continue to get moist the longer you keep them. You can add your favorite dried fruit to the cookies for additional taste.
Good luck and good eating. If you have any questions, feel free to contact me.
